  "findings": [
    "Staged connectors and fasteners are in sealed packaging with the rating and size markings turned away from view.",
    "Submitted evidence does not verify that the staged materials match the specific size or class required by the drawings."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Physically inspect the staged packaging to verify the rating, size, and class markings against the approved submittals and drawings.",
    "Document the verified markings with photographs before allowing installation to begin."
  ],
  "rationale": "The materials are staged and work has not yet begun. Because the rating and size markings are turned away and not visible in the submitted evidence, compliance with the project drawings and building codes cannot be verified. A physical inspection of the packaging labels is required to confirm the correct connectors and fasteners are used before installation starts.",

  ]
